title: wolfhsm: Client methods scattered across every module file
description: Client's full API surface is spread across client.rs, key.rs, nvm.rs, counter.rs, auth.rs, crypto/aes.rs, crypto/ecc.rs, crypto/ed25519.rs, crypto/rsa.rs, etc. via scattered impl Client blocks. This makes the type's complete interface impossible to discover without reading every file. Options: add a summary in Client's rustdoc, use extension traits, or collect a method index in client.rs.
